items.name: Momos
items.description: Six pieces. Steamed dumplings filled with vegetables or chicken or beef. Served with tomato and sesame seed chutney.

items.name: Pakoras
items.description: Four pieces. Mixture of vegetables, chickpea flour, coriander, spices, and deep-fried. Served with sweet tomato sauce (wheat-free).

items.name: Kofta Balls
items.description: Six pieces. Delicious mashed potato, veggie balls cooked with coriander, and shallots.

items.name: Samosa
items.description: Three pieces. Freshly made pastry filled with spicy vegetables. Served with sweet chili sauce.

items.name: Spring Roll
items.description: Your choice of vegetables OR meat served with sweet chilli sauce.

items.name: Thakali Soup
items.description: Kidney beans, green peas, vegetables, lentil cooked with garlic, ginger, cumin seed, and onions.

items.name: Bhatmass Sadheko
items.description: Overnight soaked soyabeans, then deep fried & mixed with special Nepali spices & served with sliced raw carrot, onion & tomatoes.

items.name: Dhal Soup
items.description: Lentil cooked with garlic, ginger, cumin seed, and onions with a dollop of sour cream.

items.name: Poleko Kukhura
items.description: Grilled marinated tender chicken pieces in aromatic spices with yogurt served with Nepali peanut sauce.

items.name: Chicken Pakora
items.description: Five pieces. Chicken breast cut in jardiniere shape, battered with chickpeas flour, mild spices, and shallow fried (wheat and gluten-free).

items.name: Choila Poleko
items.description: Grilled beef marinated with garlic, ginger & special spices turned in mustard oil served on bed of lettuce, shallots & Spanish onion with lemon dressing.

items.name: Mixed Starters (4 pieces)
items.description: One each of samosa, pakora, momo (M or V) and spring roll (M or V).

items.name: Paneer Pakora
items.description: Slices of paneer (cottage cheese) battered with corn and chickpea flour. Served with tomato sauce (gluten-free).

items.name: Bhuton
items.description: A traditional favourite Newari appetiser. Boiled chicken liver, heart & giblet fried in mustard oil, garlic, ginger & fenugreek seed & served with marinated soybeans.

items.name: Tibetan Bread
items.description: Fresh made pastry base topped with delicious tomato chutney and cheese.

items.name: Garlic OR Herb Bread
items.description: Freshly made bread with garlic OR mixed herbs & cheese.

items.name: Vegetarian Platter (Dhal Bhat Tarkari Saag)
items.description: Traditional Nepalese meal served as a platter including dhal soup, Kauli mattar, achaar, raita, saag & papadum served with rice.

items.name: Meat Platter (Dhal Bhat Tarkari)
items.description: Nepalese favourite meal served as a platter of dhal soup, either Kukura ko masu or Kashi kabab or Goru ko masu & traditional vegie curry, achaar, saag & papadum served with rice.

items.name: Vegetarian Banquet (min 4 people)
items.description: Chef's choice of breads, 3 types of veggie starters, dhal soup, selection of mains & finishing with traditional Nepalese chea.

items.name: Meat/Fish Banquet (min 4 people)
items.description: Chef's choice of breads, 3 types of starters, dhal soup, selection of meat & vegetable mains, one choice of fish, & finishing with traditional Nepalese chea.

items.name: Aloo Kofta
items.description: Mashed potato, veggie balls cooked with vegetables, and coriander seeds. Served with delicious tomato sauce (vegan).

items.name: Kauli Mattar
items.description: Popular Nepali vegetable dish cooked with cauliflower, potatoes, green peas, traditional herbs, and spices (vegan).

items.name: Tofu Curry
items.description: Tofu pieces and mixed vegetables. Served in coconut milk, yoghurt, and seasoned with Nepali spices.

items.name: Tomato Paneer
items.description: Tasty paneer cooked with capsicum, peas, fresh herbs in tomato, and yoghurt gravy.

items.name: Rajma ko Tarkari
items.description: Kidney beans, potatoes, mushrooms cooked in a tomato base with Nepali spices, and sprinkled with green coriander.

items.name: Mis Maseko Tarkari
items.description: A mixed vegetable & greens curry cooked with cumin/coriander & cardamom & served in a tomato gravy (vegan).

items.name: Bodi Tama
items.description: Beans, potatoes, bamboo shoots cooked in a garlic, ginger, cumin, and turmeric gravy (vegan).

items.name: Mixed Vegetable Curry
items.description: Blanched vegetable cooked in Nepalese spices in cashew sauce (vegan).

items.name: Churpi Saag
items.description: Diced paneer and shredded spinach cooked with gentle spice in touch of cream.

items.name: Potato Chilli (Chilli Hot)
items.description: Chili hot. Deep-fried potato then pan-fried with hot chili sauce with capsicum, onion, salt, coriander, and garlic.

items.name: Kwa Ghasha
items.description: Newari style dish, mashed lentil pattie in a kidney bean & tomato sauce served with onion, shallots & vegetables.

items.name: Sherpa Chicken
items.description: Chicken cooked in a creamy sauce with coriander, lime leaf, and a sprinkle of lemon.

items.name: Pesto Kukhura
items.description: Chicken cooked in a creamy sauce with fresh basil and pine nuts.

items.name: Kukhura ka Masu
items.description: A traditional Nepalese style chicken dish with famous Nepalese spices on tomato base sauce.

items.name: Bhuteko Kukhura
items.description: Marinated chicken cooked with onions, garlic, ginger, touch of chili, and capsicum.

items.name: Chicken Chilli
items.description: Diced, battered chicken cooked with onions, garlic, ginger, and capsicum in hot.

items.name: Chau Kukhura
items.description: Diced chicken cooked with mushroom in a tomato and cream sauce.

items.name: Goru ko Masu
items.description: Traditional Nepalese dish, slowly cooked beef in cardamom, cumin, coriander & cinnamon with a tomato gravy.

items.name: Gorkha Goru
items.description: Tender beef, slowly cooked in cream & tomato sauce with dried methi leaf and lemon juice in a tomato gravy.

items.name: Beef Chilli
items.description: Tender beef, diced & cooked in garlic, red onion & capsicum in a chilly sauce seasoned with Newari spices.

items.name: Goru Bara
items.description: Diced beef cooked with onion, cumin and coriander in a kidney bean & tomato base sauce with mashed lentil pattie.

items.name: Chau Goru
items.description: Diced beef cooked with mushrooms in a tomato and cream sauce.

items.name: Choila Bhuteko
items.description: A favourite Newari dish, specifically marinated beef fried with fresh coriander & Spanish onion with sprinkle of shallots.

items.name: Jhol Macha Tareko
items.description: Marinated fish fillet pan-fried and lightly simmered in tomato base sauce with mustard seeds.

items.name: Tareko Macha
items.description: Specially marinated fish pan-fried. Served on top of greens.

items.name: Garlic Macha
items.description: Fish cooked in creamy sauce with garlic and creams with special herbs.

items.name: Macha ko Tarkari
items.description: Fish cooked in coconut cream with garlic and ginger with a touch of sweet chili sauce.

items.name: Chau Khashi
items.description: Diced lamb cooked with mushrooms in a tomato and cream sauce.

items.name: Cashew Khashi
items.description: Tender lamb cooked with cashews in a tomato sauce.

items.name: Gorkha Lamb
items.description: Tender lamb, slowly cooked in cream, tomato sauce with dried methi leaf, and lemon juice in a tomato gravy.

items.name: Mountain Lamb
items.description: Lamb cooked with authentic spices, secret mountain herbs, blended in yoghurt, and freshly diced tomato.

items.name: Patan ko Sekuwa
items.description: Tender piece of lamb marinated in roasted cumin & coriander seed with lemon & chilli powder, fried with sliced onion, garlic, ginger & shallots.

items.name: Bhuteko Khashi
items.description: Lamb fried with onion, garlic & ginger with cumin, coriander, capsicum and tomato.

items.name: Khashi Kabab
items.description: Traditional Nepalese lamb.

items.name: Pharsi Masu
items.description: Diced goat cooked with pumpkin, garlic, ginger, cumin, and fenugreek seed.

items.name: Buff Fry Rice
items.description: Stir-fried rice mixed with eggs, vegetables and buffalo meat.

items.name: Buff Momo
items.description: Six pieces. Steamed dumplings filled with vegetables and buff. Served with tomato and sesame seed chutney.

items.name: Buff Choila
items.description: A typical Newari dish that consists of spiced grilled buffalo meat. Served with cheura and aachar.

items.name: Buff Chowmein
items.description: Chinese stir-fried noodles with vegetables and buffalo meat.

items.name: Buff Chilli
items.description: Diced, battered buff meat cooked with onions, garlic, ginger, and capsicum in hot.

items.name: Buff Sukuti
items.description: A dried buffalo meat product of Nepalese origin mixed with a variety of traditional spices. Served with cheura and aachar.

items.name: Vegetable Khana Set
items.description: An authentic Nepalese thali combining dal, bhaat, tarkari and a generous dollop of ghee.

items.name: Fish Khana Set
items.description: An authentic Nepalese thali combining dal, bhaat, tarkari, fish and a generous dollop of ghee.

items.name: Chicken Khana Set
items.description: An authentic Nepalese thali combining dal, bhaat, tarkari, chicken meat and a generous dollop of ghee.

items.name: Goat Khana Set
items.description: An authentic Nepalese thali combining dal, bhaat, tarkari, meat and a generous dollop of ghee.

items.name: Badam Sadheko
items.description: Spicy peanut salad with added tomato, Serrano, chopped cilantro, green and red onion.

items.name: Wai Wai Sadheko
items.description: Spicy noodles salad with added tomato, Serrano, chopped cilantro, green and red onion.

items.name: Piro Aaloo
items.description: Spicy potato chunks with added tomato, Serrano, chopped cilantro, green and red onion.

items.name: Nepali Salad
items.description: A dish made with fruits, vegetables, mayonnaise, and various other ingredients.

items.name: Khaja Set
items.description: An authentic Newari gourmet platter containing barbecued lamb meat, eggs along with beaten rice and spicy potato salad.

items.name: Momo Platters (Steam, C, Fry and Kothay - 5 pieces each)
items.description: Twenty pieces of momo: steamed, chilli, fry and kothay, five pieces each.

items.name: Bhutan
items.description: A spicy dish prepared with goat tripe and other digestive parts, stir-fried with shallots, onions, tomatoes, garlic with other herbs and condiments.

items.name: Chicken Fry Rice
items.description: Stir-fried rice mixed with eggs, vegetables and chicken meat.

items.name: Lalmohan
items.description: Two sweet balls in cardamom syrup.

items.name: Cream Burlee
items.description: An all-times favourite.

items.name: Mula ko Achaar
items.description: A pickle made from radishes preserved in brine, vinegar, or edible oils along with various spices.

items.name: Cheura
items.description: A kind of beaten rice with crunchy texture.
